name: firefly-iii
title: Firefly III
description: Self-hosted personal finance manager. Track transactions, budgets, bills, and savings goals. Bank import support, rule-based automation, and detailed reports. Privacy-first YNAB alternative.

variables.name: PORT_FIREFLY
variables.label: Host Port
variables.description: Port to expose Firefly III on

variables.name: FIREFLY_APP_KEY
variables.label: App Key
variables.description: 32-character encryption key (generate with: head /dev/urandom | LC_ALL=C tr -dc 'a-zA-Z0-9' | head -c 32)
